nodes.itemHTML: • Sidekiq-Cronstars1.4k - A scheduling add-on for Sidekiq.
• Jetsstars1.8k - A Ruby Serverless Framework to create and deploy serverless microservices with ease, and to seamlessly glue AWS services.
• Loafstars833 - A simple framework for easy iOS Toasts.
• Align-it - Align molecules according their pharmacophores.
• deeplearning-biologystars1.6k - Chemoinformatics and drug discovery section in deeplearning-biology repo.
• Open Source Molecular Modeling - Updateable catalog of open source molecular modeling software.
• Latte Dock - Replacement dock for Plasma desktops.
• MissKey - Federated microblogging platform.
• NativeScript-Vue - Native mobile applications with NativeScript and Vue.
• Kevin Cozens - Contributor to projects such as GIMP, OpenSimulator, KiCad and TinyScheme.
• Kyle Simpson - Author of the "You Don't Know JS" book series. Doing articles, podcasts and OSS contributions.
• Bio7 - An IDE contains tools for model creation, scientific image analysis and statistical analysis for ecological modelling.
• RCassandra - Direct interface (not Java) to the most basic functionality of Apache Cassandra.
• gapminderstars203 - Excerpt from the Gapminder dataset (data about countries through the past 50 years).
• RPostgresstars254 - an DBI-compliant interface to the postgres database.
• Consul Cluster Managerstars15 - Consul cluster manager.
• Aggregates.NETstars272 - .NET event sourced domain driven design model via NServicebus and GetEventStore.
• AggregateSourcestars240 - Lightweight infrastructure for doing eventsourcing using aggregates.
• Akka.NET - Akka.NET is a toolkit and runtime for building highly concurrent, distributed, and fault tolerant event-driven applications on .NET & Mono.
• ASP.NET Boilerplate - ASP.NET MVC, Web API and ASP.NET Core based application framework to create NLayered, Domain Driven Designed web Applications implementing best practices.
• Cedar.CommandHandlingstars46 - Middleware to handling commands over HTTP; typically used in CQRS applications.
• Cirqusstars221 - d60 event sourcing + CQRS framework.
• CoreDddstars66 - Set of open-source .NET libraries helping with DDD and CQRS, with NHibernate persistence
• CQRS on Azurestars25 CQRS on Windows Azure.
• EventFlowstars1.8k - Async/await first CQRS+ES and DDD framework for .NET http://geteventflow.net/.
• Its.Cqrsstars76 - A set of libraries for CQRS and Event Sourcing, with a Domain-Driven Design flavor.
• MassTransitstars3.5k - Distributed Application Framework for .NET.
• NServiceBusstars1.8k - Service bus for .NET.
• shriek-fxstars647 - An simple,elegant and useful Domain-Driven Design and CQRS framework developed using .NET Core 2.0.
• SqlStreamStorestars4 - .NET Stream Store library targeting SQL based implementations.
• Stringly.Typedstars38 - Making it easier to convert strings to/from .NET types.
• Xer.Cqrsstars94 - A simple library for creating applications based on the CQRS pattern with support for attribute routing and hosted handlers. Developed in C# targeting .NET Standard 1.0.
• Event Store - The open-source, functional database with Complex Event Processing in JavaScript.
• Event Busstars578 - Traceable, extendable and minimalist event bus implementation for Elixir with built-in event store and event watcher based on ETS.
• cqrs.js - CQRS implementations in node.js. Includes node-eventstorestars509, node-cqrs-domainstars258, node-eventdenormalizerstars39, node-cqrs-sagastars56.
• akka-dddstars333 - Reusable artifacts for building applications on top of the Akka platform following CQRS/DDDD-based approach.
• Apache Isis - Apache Isis is a framework for rapidly developing domain-driven apps in Java.
• Axon Framework - The axon framework is focused on making life easier for developers that want to create a java application based on the CQRS principles.
• JESAstars8 - Event sourced aggregates for Java.
• Lagom - The Lagom Framework is a microservices framework for the Java Virtual Machine, with APIs for the Java and Scala languages. It includes an Event Sourcing/CQRS based persistence module.
• SeedStack's Business Framework - A set of building blocks that enable you to code business logic according to the Domain-Driven Design (DDD) approach.
• Belfast
• Cracow
• Wroclaw
• CQRS-DDD Examplestars105 - Domain Driven Design, CQRS, & Event Sourcing Example using GetEventStore, CommonDomain, NServiceBus, Entity Framework, SQL Server, SignalR.
• ContosoUniversityCorestars527 - ContosoUniversity on ASP.NET Core with Full .NET Framework.
• DDDInventoryItemFSharpstars172 - An idiomatic F# implementation of Domain-Driven Design
• DDDSkeletonNetstars156 (C#) - a .NET skeleton project to introduce the concepts of Domain Driven Design and loosely coupled layers.
• EmailMakerstars9 - Email marketing ASP.NET Core MVC and ASP.NET MVC demo app demonstrating CoreDddstars66 usage
• eShopOnContainersDDDstars138 - eShop fullstack example featuring catalog, basket, checkout, and order bounded contexts
• Fohjinstars664 - Example project that accompanies Mark Nijhof's CQRS book.
• FsUnostars76 - Event sourcing implementation sample in F#.
• IDDD Samples in .NETstars749 - These are the sample Bounded Contexts for C#.NET from the book "Implementing Domain-Driven Design" by Vaughn Vernon.
• NLayerAppV3stars139 (.Net Core Preview 2) - a N-Layered Architecture Sample Project.
• Reactive Trader Cloudstars1.6k - Reactive Trader Cloud by Adaptive Consulting.
• SimpleCQRSstars1.8k - Greg Young's "Simplest Thing" CQRS with Event Sourcing project.
• TodoMVC-DDD-CQRS-EventSourcingstars144 - Implementation of basic Todo app via tastejs/todomvc in C#/Typescript with eventsourcing, cqrs, and domain driven design
• Eventuria gsdstars37 - Haskell todo list reactive application with DDD, CQRS and Event Sourcing, FRP.
• wolkenkit Sample Applications - A collection of DDD sample applications, such as TodoMVC, a geocaching app, collaborative boards etc.
• Event Sourcing Examplestars74 - A simplified (in memory) example of Event Sourcing and CQRS implementation for Java code (modeled for banking domain use cases).
• IDDD Samplesstars2.7k - These are the sample Bounded Contexts from the book "Implementing Domain-Driven Design" by Vaughn Vernon.
• DDD Wish Liststars172 - A sample application in PHP built with Symfony 3 and Vue.js.
• DDD Playgroundstars520 - Sample implementation in PHP.
• Awesome Event Stormingstars1.4k - awesome list that focuses only on Event Storming.

• Reactive Architecture: CQRS and Event Sourcing - This course will discuss the reasons we use CQRS/ES, what benefits it provides us, but also what it will cost us to use. We will see how CQRS/ES can impact the scalability, consistency, and availability of our application.
